name: Crispy Corny Baked Chicken
recipeIngredient: Cut up, skin and fat removed
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 400°F.
2 Season chicken with salt, pepper, and garlic.
3 Dip the chicken into milk and roll in cornflake crumbs.
4 Place pieces in a lightly Pam-sprayed baking dish, ensuring they do not touch.
5 Bake for 45 minutes or until tender. (Fat: 5.6g, Cholesterol: 79mg.)
